events.title: New Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea at Dragon Tea Temple
events.description: An evening of devotional kirtan led by Bhakti Bliss Bali (Jeremy Sol), woven together with a refined ceremonial tea service, an ecstatic dance journey around the fire, and a closing cosmic sound healing. Dragon Tea Temple sits at Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan — a candlelit garden space known for its unhurried ceremony pace and community-built ritual containers. The new moon timing makes this an intention-setting night: arrive open, leave clear.
events.short_description: Devotional kirtan, sacred tea, fire-side ecstatic dance, and cosmic sound healing on the new moon.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Kecamatan Ubud, Kabupaten Gianyar, Bali 80571

events.title: Beauty Way — Sacred Dance, Live Music & Cacao Ceremony
events.description: The Yoga Barn's seasonal Beauty Way returns for its July edition: a deepening of intention and a celebration of community through sacred bass music, ceremony, and dance. The evening opens at 6pm with a sunset live music set by Monaxi — a masterful vocalist and multi-instrumentalist from Portugal weaving tribal rhythms and African chants. At 7pm, a cacao ceremony led by Purnama, a ceremonialist of Balinese-Swiss lineage. From there, ecstatic DJs Acharya and NRYN carry the night through their signature deep future-tribal sound, with a prayerformance by professional dancers Mana Mei and Faye woven through. Complimentary cacao elixir by Ubud Raw Cacao. Yoga Barn Garden Kafe open throughout.
events.short_description: Sunset live music, Balinese cacao ceremony, and ecstatic DJ sets in the Yoga Barn courtyard.
events.venue_address: Jl. Hanoman, Ubud, Kabupaten Gianyar, Bali 80571

events.title: Ecstatic Dance with DJ YUJOY — Live Concert & Sound Healing
events.description: International DJ, musician and producer YUJOY — one of the driving forces behind the global Ecstatic Dance movement — takes the floor at Azadi Retreat for a full evening of dance, live concert, and sound healing. YUJOY's sets draw on electronic, folk, ethnic, hip-hop, soul and funk, creating a layered sonic journey that is genuinely hard to categorise and impossible to stand still through. Rice-field setting at Azadi, 10 minutes from central Ubud. Tickets via Megatix.
events.short_description: International ecstatic dance DJ YUJOY brings his layered live set and sound healing to a rice-field retreat venue outside Ubud.
events.venue_address: Banjar Laplapan, Pejeng Kawan, Kecamatan Ubud, Kabupaten Gianyar, Bali 80552

events.title: Essence of Love — Weekly Couples Tantra Workshop
events.description: A weekly drop-in couples workshop at Bara Studio, Penestanan, led by certified Tantra Essence facilitators trained directly in the lineage of Ma Ananda Sarita. Each session is a stand-alone experience with fresh practices: partner meditations, Tantra-inspired movement, breath, and conscious touch — always fully clothed, grounded, and in a clear consent container. Couples who treat this as a weekly ritual consistently report deepened attunement and renewed intimacy. Single partners welcome when half of a registered couple. Arrive by 6:20pm. 500,000 IDR per couple with advance booking.
events.short_description: Weekly tantra couples workshop in Penestanan: partner meditation, breath, movement, and conscious touch in a clear consent container.

events.title: Dance of the Dragonfly — Expanded Weekly Edition Launch
events.description: The weekly somatic embodied ecstatic dance at Dragonfly Village relaunches in expanded form from July 23. Led by Ritual Beats and Emmalee Bevan in an open-air wooden shala surrounded by rice fields, the Wednesday evening journey now continues post-dance with a herbal steam sauna and salt-water pool, a fire circle for soul connection, and hearty food. The dance itself is free-movement, no experience needed — 150,000 IDR for Kitas holders, 200,000 IDR for visitors, with an additional 80,000 IDR for the sauna/pool/fire. Arrive ready to move.
events.short_description: Dragonfly Village's somatic dance ritual expands from July 23: rice-field shala, ecstatic movement, then fire circle, steam sauna, salt-water pool.
events.venue_address: Ubud area, Bali (Dragonfly Village — minutes from central Ubud)
events.price_info: IDR 150k (Kitas) / 200k (visitors) for dance; +80k for sauna/pool/fire circle

events.title: ECSTANTRIC DANCE: Tantra Flow & Ecstatic Dance
events.description: A one-of-a-kind evening that fuses tantra practice with ecstatic dance floor energy. Katya Reihan opens with guided tantra flow — working with life-force energy, embodied presence, and somatic release — before DJ Goldie takes over with a charged, ecstatic set. Katya and Sean Goldberg (DJ Goldie) are experts in tantra, yoga, and meditation. Held in Lodtunduh, on the south edge of the Ubud crater. Specific venue address emailed to confirmed ticket holders. Tickets via Megatix.
events.short_description: Guided tantra flow with Katya Reihan followed by ecstatic DJ set with DJ Goldie in a private Ubud venue.

events.title: Awakening the Heart: Journey into Love & Self-Love
events.description: A two-day residential immersion at Swasti Eco Cottages facilitated by Dharmaraj, who brings decades of experience in the tantric, Osho, and embodiment traditions. The retreat creates a safe container for authentic emotional release, expansion, and heartfelt connection with others. Schedule runs morning, afternoon, and evening sessions on both days, with lunch on Day 1 and brunch on Day 2 included. Spaces are limited and the retreat historically sells out. Early bird tickets are non-refundable; standard tickets eligible for 50% credit if cancelled more than 4 weeks ahead.
events.short_description: Two-day tantric embodiment retreat with Dharmaraj at Swasti Eco Cottages — emotional release, heart opening, authentic connection.
events.price_info: Early bird and standard tier — contact organisers. Meals included.
